_comment: Copy to hd_rerender.config.json and edit. comfy_root must be the directory containing main.py and the input/, output/, models/ subfolders. model is the filename of a .pth in models/upscale_models/ - omit it to use --quality's default (SPAN for every tier currently; see QUALITY_MODELS in hd_rerender.py). upscale_model is a legacy alias for model, kept for configs written before quality tiers existed.
